name: German Slaw
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine vinegar, oil, mustard seed, celery seed, salt, and pepper.
2. Layer cabbage, onion, green bell pepper in the bowl.
3. Sprinkle half of the sugar over the layers.
4. Make another layer by adding the remaining vegetables.
5. Sprinkle the rest of the sugar on top.
6. Pour the boiling mixture over the layered vegetables.
7. Seal the container and refrigerate for at least 5 hours, or overnight.
8. Just before serving, gently toss the salad.
